text: Keep reference submodules in-repo and move stable autoharness distribution to a PyPI-backed release pipeline; plan the migration and delivery workflow
Enable full agent-engram integration in the autoharness dogfood workspace so Engram becomes the first-line search, relationship traversal, impact, and improvement surface when installed
Revise queued Engram integration work so the next shipment installs and fully weaves capability packs agent-engram, agent-intercom, and graphtor-docs, starting from main after 033-S merges
